description: Contains textual content from SEC filings, including management discussions, risk factors, and other narrative sections.

columns.name: id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each text block

columns.name: ticker
columns.description: Company stock ticker symbol (e.g., NVDA, AAPL, TSLA)

columns.name: fiscal_period
columns.description: Fiscal period (e.g., annual, Q1, Q2, Q3)

columns.name: filing_date
columns.description: Date when the filing was submitted to the SEC

columns.name: block_id
columns.description: Identifier for the text block (e.g., tb-1)

columns.name: title
columns.description: Title or heading of the text block

columns.name: content
columns.description: Full text content of the block

columns.name: content_embedding
columns.description: Vector embedding of the content for semantic search

table_rules: Use LIKE or ILIKE for simple text pattern matching
For semantic search, use vector similarity with the content_embedding column
When joining with financial_data, join on ticker, filing_type, fiscal_year, and fiscal_period
For full-text search, use to_tsvector and to_tsquery with the content column

column_rules.content: Contains the full text, which can be very long
column_rules.title: Often contains a summary or heading that describes the content
column_rules.content_embedding: Use for semantic similarity search with vector operations
